data_coverage_summary: Users API manages user and driver-linked identity records for Motive account synchronization, permissions, and operational identity workflows.
buyer_guidance: Use Users API for identity and driver-account synchronization; it is useful for provisioning and access alignment, not for equipment telemetry or physical asset modeling.
overview: Users API is an identity-management surface for user and driver-linked records. It supports creation and updates to those records, but it is not a physical asset API and does not expose time-varying operational telemetry. Asset data is Unsupported. Telemetry data is Unsupported. Writeback is Supported.

available_data.description: The API is focused on user lifecycle and account-level identity synchronization.

ingest_considerations: This surface is best handled as identity administration, not as a fleet-asset or telemetry feed.
Because it is write-capable, downstream systems should enforce approval and source-of-truth rules for user updates.

source_evidence.evidence_notes: Classification is based on the Motive Open API reference and the captured product summary describing user identities and driver-linked user synchronization, along with documented create and update operations.
